title: Vove Organic Konjac Baby Bath Sponges Pack of 3 - Safe, Gentle & Natural for Newborns, Babies & Toddlers, Cute Ocean Shapes, Plant-Based Baby Bath Time, Baby Shower, Certified Organic

features: 100% SAFE FOR BABY’S DELICATE SKIN: Crafted from pure organic konjac root with natural clay and fruit extracts – entirely plant-based, non-toxic, and gentle for newborns. Softer than standard flannels, ideal for sensitive baby skin.

ADORABLE OCEAN SHAPES MAKE BATH TIME FUN: Includes 3 charming shapes – shell, coral, and starfish – to transform bath time into playtime. Perfectly sized for little hands, encouraging independent washing as your baby grows.

NATURAL & SUSTAINABLE BABY CARE: EU Organic certified konjac sponges are compostable and packaged in FSC-certified materials. A safe, eco-conscious alternative to synthetic bath toys and harsh cleansers.

EASY FOR BUSY PARENTS: Simply soak in warm water to soften, gently cleanse baby, then rinse and hang to dry with the cotton string. Produces a soft, gentle lather and dries quickly to help prevent mould – ideal for daily use.

THE VOVE DIFFERENCE: Trusted by parents across the UK for safe, natural baby care. Suitable for infants, toddlers, and children of all ages. A thoughtful baby shower gift combining safety, sustainability, and fun.

product_details_tab_data.Categories - Tree: Beauty › Bath & Body › Bathing Accessories › Loofahs, Sponges & Poufs › Sponges
product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: To ensure the longevity and hygiene of your Vove Organic Konjac Body Sponges, rinse and hang to dry after each use. Allow the sponge to dry completely between uses to prevent bacterial growth. Replace the sponge every 2-3 months for optimal performance and safety.
